failures.description: The agent misread or incorrectly reasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the more expensive smartphone instead of the cheapest returned item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The agent correctly planned and invoked ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, contradicting the relevant tool output. This is not an invalid invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the needed evidence was already available.
